settings.heading: Browse partner offers by category.
settings.hero_text: Explore practical partner offers across business finance, technology, operations, connectivity, insurance and other useful service categories.
settings.panel_text: Choose a category to view relevant offers, compare options and open each offer on its own detail page.
settings.list_text: Select a category to see the available partner offers in that area.
settings.cta_text: Each offer is reviewed, organised by category and redeemable through a direct partner link.
